title: CachingStore: no test for TTL-expiry → refetch path
description:
secretx-cache/src/lib.rs: The TTL expiry → cache miss → inner.get() path has zero test coverage. Existing tests cover: (a) cache hit, (b) zero-TTL passthrough, (c) put populates cache, (d) refresh updates cache. The code path 'entry.fetched_at.elapsed() >= ttl' is never exercised. A regression in the TTL comparison (e.g. off-by-one, wrong comparison direction) would pass all tests. Fix: add a test with a very short TTL (e.g. 1ms), sleep just past it, call get() twice, assert inner was called exactly twice.

**Expected impact:** If the TTL check were inverted (>= instead of <), the cache would never be used. The bug would survive all existing tests.
